fundamentals.name: Lumentum Holdings Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: Lumentum Holdings Inc. manufactures and sells optical and photonic products in the Americas, the Asia-Pacific, Europe, the Middle East, and Africa. It operates through two segments, Cloud & Networking and Industrial Tech. The Cloud & Networking segment offers optical and photonic chips, components, modules, and subsystems supplied to cloud data center operators, AI/ML infrastructure providers, and network equipment manufacturer customers that are building cloud data centers and network infrastructures. Its Industrial Tech segment provides short-pulse solid-state lasers, kilowatt-class fiber lasers, diode lasers, and gas lasers that serves the semiconductor device, solar cell, display, and electric vehicle and battery manufacturing markets. The company was incorporated in 2015 and is headquartered in San Jose, California.

geographic.name: Other Asia Pacific Not Individually Identified

judgment.summary: Lumentum Holdings exhibits strong growth metrics and analyst optimism, but faces significant valuation concerns and a leveraged balance sheet.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported quarter beat EPS estimates; next earnings date is 2026-05-05.
positives: Revenue growth 90.1% YoY and analyst growth estimates of 236.6% for the current quarter and 300.7% for the current fiscal year indicate substantial top-line expansion.
Profit margin of 17.7% and Return on Equity of 22.8% demonstrate solid profitability and efficient use of shareholder capital.
Analyst consensus is a strong buy with a mean target price of $1104.68, suggesting significant upside potential.
Last reported quarter beat EPS estimates by 4.6%.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 159.20 and Forward P/E of 49.96 are exceptionally high, suggesting the stock is priced for perfection.
Price/Sales (TTM) of 28.27 and Price/Book of 76.27 also indicate a very rich valuation.
Debt/Equity ratio of 111.44 suggests a highly leveraged balance sheet.
Free cash flow of $93.35M is modest relative to the company's market capitalization and debt levels.

news.paragraph: Lumentum Holdings (LITE) was mentioned in a Motley Fool article flagging a potential red flag, advising caution before investing. This comes amidst broader market excitement driven by major tech stocks, but LITE itself is not directly cited as a driver of this excitement. The company's last reported quarter showed an earnings beat, and analysts project strong growth for the current quarter and fiscal year, with a consensus buy rating and a mean target price of $1104.68.
